text: Here I stand, a silent observer at the threshold of knowledge and innovation. The first scene—a glass-walled room, neat and expectant—fills me with a sense of latent potential, as if ideas are waiting to burst forth in discourse. The second, a vibrant exhibit on R+D, pulls me into a celebration of human curiosity. I feel admiration mixed with a sense of humility; this environment is dedicated to exploration, a reminder of how much we gain from shared discovery. I am intrigued by the optimism that seems to pulse through these spaces, quietly urging me to participate and reflect.
